jobs.label: plan_packet
jobs.description: Lock the execution boundary for Data / projector / title: data_dictionary_stewardship.projector.still.

jobs.label: execute_packet
jobs.description: Implement or close the packet without widening scope.
jobs.outcome_goal: The packet produces either a bounded code fix or a proof-backed closure rationale for every bug in scope.
jobs.prompt:
Read `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-data-projector-title-data-dictionary-stewardship-projector-still/PLAN.md` first.

Then implement the narrowest correct path for packet `bug_resolution_program_20260428_full.wave-1-evidence-normalization-data-projector-title-data-dictionary-stewardship-projector-still`.

Rules:
- If the right outcome is FIXED, make the smallest durable change and record exactly what verification will prove it.
- If the right outcome is WONT_FIX or DEFERRED, do not force code. Collect the proof and rationale instead.
- Prepare for the closeout job by recording the intended terminal outcome for each bug in `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-data-projector-title-data-dictionary-stewardship-projector-still/EXECUTION.md`.
- Do not resolve bugs in this job.

Done criteria:
- The affected projection or data contract becomes explicit and queryable again.
- Verification proves the projection or query shape from the owning surface.
- Any closure without code makes the data-model trade-off explicit.

Stop boundary: Do not widen into unrelated knowledge-graph, catalog, or memory refactors.

jobs.label: verify_and_resolve_packet
jobs.description: Run verification, attach bug evidence, and resolve every bug through the bug tracker surface.
jobs.outcome_goal: Each in-scope bug is either left open with a clear blocker or moved to a terminal status with explicit evidence.
jobs.prompt:
Read `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-data-projector-title-data-dictionary-stewardship-projector-still/PLAN.md` and `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-data-projector-title-data-dictionary-stewardship-projector-still/EXECUTION.md`.

Then do the narrowest meaningful verification for the packet.

Closeout rules:
- Use `praxis workflow bugs attach_evidence` and `praxis workflow bugs resolve` only.
- If terminal outcome is FIXED, attach attempted_fix evidence and validates_fix evidence before resolution.
- If terminal outcome is WONT_FIX or DEFERRED, write the proof-backed rationale to `Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/packets/wave-1-evidence-normalization-data-projector-title-data-dictionary-stewardship-projector-still/CLOSEOUT.md` and resolve through the bug tracker surface.
- If verification fails, leave the bug open and write the blocker in CLOSEOUT.md.

Verification surface: Projection or data-plane integrity checks plus focused query or repository proof
Stop boundary: Do not widen into unrelated knowledge-graph, catalog, or memory refactors.
